logs.message: Dashboard.Infrastructure depends on Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory (>= 10.0.0-preview.2.25120.7) but Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory 10.0.0-preview.2.25120.7 was not found. Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory 10.0.0-preview.2.25163.8 was resolved instead.
Package 'Newtonsoft.Json' 11.0.2 has a known high severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5crp-9r3c-p9vr
